cards.credit_assignment_rule: Credit when normalization strategy is selected before oracle and Lean accepts or fails only on tactic orientation.
cards.leakage_boundary: No proof body or oracle-needed premise id is visible before Lean check.
cards.mathematical_lens: View the target as two expressions to normalize toward a shared canonical form.
cards.name: Equality normal form
cards.proof_plan_template: try exact/rewrite/simp using the highest-scoring equality premise
cards.representation_transform: Normalize both sides by theorem families such as commutativity, associativity, involution, or length lemmas.

cards.credit_assignment_rule: Credit when iff target routes to bidirectional proof planning.
expected_problem_shapes: P <-> Q from P -> Q and Q -> P
failure_modes: using Iff.rfl when directions are not definitional
cards.leakage_boundary: Only statement and Iff.intro premise statement are visible before oracle.
cards.mathematical_lens: Treat an iff target as two directed implications.
cards.name: Iff split
cards.proof_plan_template: intro both implication hypotheses; exact Iff.intro hpq hqp
cards.representation_transform: Construct Iff.intro and solve both directions.

cards.credit_assignment_rule: Credit when constructor equality triggers injection before retrieval.
expected_problem_shapes: Nat.succ m = Nat.succ n -> m = n
cards.mathematical_lens: Equality of constructed values can imply equality of constructor arguments.
cards.name: Constructor injectivity
cards.representation_transform: Introduce the equality and apply the constructor injectivity theorem.

cards.credit_assignment_rule: Credit when recursive-data shape triggers induction/library-recursion planning.
cards.leakage_boundary: No oracle proof body in forward induction skeleton.
cards.mathematical_lens: Quantified goals over recursively defined data often want induction or a library induction theorem.
cards.name: Recursive data induction
cards.proof_plan_template: try Nat.add_zero; otherwise induction on the recursive argument
cards.representation_transform: Choose the recursive argument and either apply the library lemma or emit an induction skeleton.

cards.credit_assignment_rule: Credit when constructed-membership targets expand retrieval with membership lemmas.
expected_problem_shapes: a in xs ++ ys iff a in xs or a in ys
cards.leakage_boundary: No known proof body in premise index.
cards.mathematical_lens: Membership in a constructed collection is equivalent to membership in its parts.
cards.name: Membership decomposition
cards.representation_transform: Retrieve and apply the collection membership characterization lemma.

cards.credit_assignment_rule: Credit when nested-map view expands retrieval to fusion premises.
expected_problem_shapes: map g (map f xs) = map (g o f) xs
cards.leakage_boundary: Oracle needed premise ids are audited only after Lean check.
cards.mathematical_lens: Nested structure-preserving operations may fuse into one operation over a composed function.
cards.name: Composition fusion
cards.representation_transform: Search map/fusion lemmas and orient the composed function correctly.

cards.credit_assignment_rule: Credit strategy selection separately from proof synthesis success.
expected_problem_shapes: rhs = lhs when library lemma gives lhs = rhs
failure_modes: strategy selected but v0 skeleton emits the direct theorem only
cards.leakage_boundary: Orientation diagnosis is oracle-side after check.
cards.mathematical_lens: A retrieved equality premise may solve the target only after reversing or rewriting in the right direction.
cards.name: Symmetry or orientation
cards.proof_plan_template: try Eq.symm around the direct equality premise
cards.representation_transform: Try Eq.symm or directed rewrite after retrieving the direct lemma.

cards.credit_assignment_rule: Credit when contradiction shape avoids irrelevant premise lookup.
failure_modes: contradiction hypothesis not named or not present
cards.mathematical_lens: False assumptions or impossible targets collapse by contradiction elimination.
cards.name: Contradiction or false target
cards.representation_transform: Introduce/case-analyze the contradiction and eliminate False.
